calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Continued To Feb-16-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Response To Requests For Production Of Docs
Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Cyril Lawrence, Esq. 209-383-6854 for Plaintiff.
Kartikey Pradhan, Esq. 415-926-7600 Kaufman Dolowich for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Club Donatello Owners Association's Motion To Compel Response To Requests For Production Of Docs is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Point And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CLUB DONATELLO OWNERS ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint.

Plaintiff Club Donatello Owners Association's motion for leave to filed a second amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)
